text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Dance is all about keeping with the rhythm. 
If you want it to look polished and beautiful…

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Step, one, two… huff. Step… puff, one, two.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Heheeh♪ You see, dancing comes 
naturally to a princess!!
